tool_input.command:
cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f's{i}: {s[\"title\"]}') for i,s in enumerate(d['sections'],1)]" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "
import json, sys
with open('/home/tie303177/work/nabledge-dev/.claude/worktrees/395-add-md-section-links/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-bean-validation.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
for s in d['sections']:
    print(s['id'] + ': ' + s['title'][:80])
"
